agentMessage.excerpt:
The implementation is already complete in both files. The `getAttrDef` function in `tags.ts` (line ~226-230) delegates to `getTagDef` for case-insensitive tag resolution, returns `undefined` on miss, and performs case-insensitive attribute lookup. The four test cases in `tags.test.ts` (lines ~114-133) cover all the required scenarios: known attribute, case-insensitive match, unknown tag, and known-tag/unknown-attribute.

Both files match the approved plan exactly — no further changes are needed.

**Summary:** `getAttrDef(tagName, attrName)` function with case-insensitive lookup and four vitest test cases were already present in `apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts` and `apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts` respectively.
